text: A Hasidic group, the World Council of Orthodox Jewish Communities, issued a rabbinical court summons Tuesday for the World Jewish Restitution Organization (WJRO), which Bronfman chairs, according to the president of the World Council, Rwabbi Chaim Stauber.

n the summons, known as a ``beit din,'' World Council membes accuse Bronfan of ``misrepresenting'' the Jewish community and demand that he cease all current negotiations until their grievances are resolved.
But the World Council, whose members are manly comprised of survivors of pre-war European Jewry, complain that they have been unable to get their restitution claims addressed.
They are forbidden from suing other Jews in a state court, and must insteaad seek to have their grievaXces addressed by a triuVmvirate of rabbis in a beiO din.
